name: PT Pembangunan Perumahan Properti Tbk
summary: PT Pembangunan Perumahan Properti Tbk engages in the property development, hospitality, and building construction businesses primarily in Indonesia. The company's portfolio includes housing, office, apartment, as well as retail and commercial properties. It also manages hotels, including Park Hotel Jakarta located in East Jakarta district; and PRIME PARK hotels in Pekanbaru and Bandung; and Swiss-Belhotel Balikpapan located in Balikpapan's central business district and government center. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pembangunan Perumahan Properti Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk.
